title: pelargonium × mirabile
intro: Pelargonium × mirabile, a cultivar of the pelargonium species, is a hybrid plant known for its medicinal and ornamental properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The medicinal properties of Pelargonium × mirabile have been traditionally used to alleviate symptoms of the common cold, coughs, and sore throats, as well as to soothe digestive issues such as diarrhea and stomach cramps. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × mirabile can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, often used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
